The '''X2-a series sensor node''' designed by [[MicroThrust Processors]] was a piece of equipment for the battlefield used during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Sensor nodes placed throughout the battlefield collected and monitored specific locations for any kind of activity and transmitted the data back to field troops. Individual sensor node range was small, but a network of nodes placed throughout a battlefield could provide field commanders with a lot of valuable information.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
